name: My Era...Begins!! (Reprint)
effect_text: [Main] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Blackbeard Pirates" type card other than [My Era...Begins!!] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.[Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
